title: Dawn Transition
description: Trans your Pokémon's genders with a Dawn Stone!
body:
## Dawn Transition
A tweak pack for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) that awakens your Pokémon's inner identity and transforms their gender using a Dawn Stone!

Dawn Transition features trans evolutions for most Pokémon with major gender variations and genderlocked evolutions, as well as a few notable trans icons as well.

To have your Pokémon transition, you can use a Dawn Stone once they meet their default original criteria for evolution. Their transition evolutions can be located below their default evolutions.

<details>
<summary>Supported Pokémon</summary>
Italicized criteria are new criteria added by this pack.

- Foonguss to **Amoonguss** — After reaching level 39
- Marill to **Azumarill** — After reaching level 18
- Snorunt to **Froslass** — No other criteria required
- Kirlia to **Gallade** — No other criteria required
- Kirlia to **Gardevoir** — After reaching level 30, _holding Dawn Stone, use Fairy Feather_
- Snorunt to **Glalie** — After reaching level 42, _holding Dawn Stone, use Never-Melt Ice_
- Hippopotas to **Hippowdon** — After reaching level 34
- Frillish to **Jellicent** — After reaching level 40
- Lechonk to **Oinkologne** — After reaching level 18
- Azurill to **Marill** — After reaching 160+ friendship
- Nidorina to **Nidoking** — _At night_
- Nidorino to **Nidoqueen** — _At night_
- Espurr to **Meowstic** — After level 25
- Litleo to **Pyroar** — After reaching level 35
- Salandit to **Salazzle** — After reaching level 33
- Carvanha to **Sharpedo** — After reaching level 30
- Eevee to **Sylveon** — After 160+ friendship and a Fairy-type move
- Tranquill to **Unfezant** — After level 32
- Combee to **Vespiquen** — After level 21

Unfortunately due to technical limitations regarding changing data of forms, **Basculin-White** cannot transition yet.
</details>

Happy catching!

_Requires Cobblemon, of course. Support can be requested over at the Official Cobblemon Discord._
